    • visitBOUND_IDENT_DECL

      public boolean visitBOUND_IDENT_DECL(BoundIdentDecl ident)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Visits a BOUND_IDENT_DECL node.
      Specified by:
      visitBOUND_IDENT_DECL in interface IVisitor
      Overrides:
      visitBOUND_IDENT_DECL in class DefaultVisitor
      Parameters:
      ident - the node to visit
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the siblings of the given node, true to continue visiting.
